What I Offer

Service 01

Websites

Clean, fast, mobile-friendly websites for businesses, churches, schools, and personal brands. From a simple landing page to a full multi-page site with contact forms and SEO basics.

From Ksh 15,000
Service 02

Mobile Apps

Cross-platform apps that run on both Android and iOS. Built with React Native — one codebase, two platforms. Perfect for businesses wanting a branded app without double the cost.

From Ksh 50,000
Service 03

Custom Software

Inventory systems, booking systems, POS systems, management dashboards. If your business needs a custom tool to run better, I can build it — desktop, web, or both.

Quote on Request
Service 04

AI-Powered Tools

Chatbots, automation tools, and AI integrations for your business. I've built AI into real systems — I can do the same for yours using the latest models.

Quote on Request
03

Featured Work

Completed
Full-Stack System · FYP

ICT Asset Inventory System

A full-stack asset management system built for GreenTech College. Features a desktop app (Tkinter), REST API (FastAPI), mobile app (React Native), and an AI-powered chatbot using Groq/LLaMA for real-time asset queries and predictive maintenance. Complete end-to-end system with JWT authentication and PostgreSQL database.

Python FastAPI PostgreSQL React Native Groq AI Tkinter JWT REST API
In Progress
Web Development

Reliance Website

A professional business website currently under development. Built with a focus on clean design, responsive layout, and a strong brand presence to drive online visibility and client engagement.

04

About Me

I'm a final-year BBIT student at KCA University, Nairobi, with a passion for building software that actually works and makes a difference. I specialize in full-stack development — from database design all the way to mobile apps.

My Final Year Project was a complete ICT Asset Inventory Management System, a multi-platform solution combining a desktop app, a mobile app, a REST API backend, and an AI chatbot. That project taught me how real systems are built.

I'm now available for freelance projects: websites, mobile apps, custom software, and AI-powered tools. If you have an idea, let's build it.
